home.title: WARP connection
home.copy: Manage the local CloudflareWARP daemon through warp-cli.

app.title: App
app.copy: ThirdFlare One preferences, localization, and updates.
app.downgradeWarn: Selected release is older than the installed version.
app.restartRequired: Update applied. Restart ThirdFlare One to finish.
app.noReleases: No releases found for this repository.

tips.mode: WARP operating mode (warp, DoH, DoT, proxy, tunnel-only).
tips.protocol: Preferred tunnel protocol: MASQUE or WireGuard.
tips.families: Cloudflare DNS filtering: off, malware, or full.
tips.masque: HTTP version preference when using MASQUE.
tips.splitTunnel: Exclude IPs or hosts from the WARP tunnel.
tips.channel: Stable uses the latest non-prerelease; beta prefers prereleases.
tips.sourceOwner: GitHub owner for the pinned upstream or one of its forks.
tips.sourceRepo: Repository under the selected owner. Only upstream and its forks are listed.
tips.release: Optional specific release tag. Leave on channel default to follow stable/beta.
tips.refreshSources: Reload upstream and fork list from GitHub.
tips.checkUpdates: Compare the installed version to the selected channel or release.
